TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Valjulu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 94 buwan, 242 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 239 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Valjulu ga Maledep ru Tjuletevetevek. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Valjulu ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Valjulu ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Valjulu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh alang Valjulu ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 128 buwan, 399 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 383 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 16 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 91%, Rukay 3%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Valjulu hya' ga Djineljepan. tay mkyahu' na Valjulu hya' ga Sagaran. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *aljulu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na *aljulu ɣa male*ep ru tjulete*ete*ek. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *aljulu ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ *aljulu ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *aljulu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ alaŋ *aljulu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu s~ɕantimon ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na *aljulu ħjaʔ ɣa *jineljepan. taj mkjaħuʔ na *aljulu ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaɣaran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Valjulu ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 94 buwan, 242 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 239 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Valjulu ga Maledep ru Tjuletevetevek. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Valjulu ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Valjulu ga maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Valjulu ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh alang Valjulu ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 128 buwan, 399 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 383 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 16 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 91%, Rukay 3%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Valjulu hya' ga Djineljepan. tay mkyahu' na Valjulu hya' ga Sagaran. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *aljulu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na *aljulu ɣa male*ep ru tjulete*ete*ek. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ *aljulu ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ *aljulu ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ *aljulu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ alaŋ *aljulu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu s~ɕantimon ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na *aljulu ħjaʔ ɣa *jineljepan. taj mkjaħuʔ na *aljulu ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaɣaran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
